name: known-issue
description: Known issue capture — bugs, outages, gotchas, failure modes. Incorporates MRE principles (Minimal, Reproducible, Complete) from Stack Overflow. See references/minimal-reproducible-example.md.

affected_systems.description: Systems, tools, or services affected (controlled vocabulary — red-string eligible)

reproducibility.description: How reliably the issue reproduces. If 'always', reproduction steps MUST be minimal and complete per MRE principles.

workaround_available.description: Highest-value triage signal — answers 'can I unblock myself right now?'

root_cause_known.description: Whether root cause has been identified

discovered_at.description: When first observed (may differ from created_at)

impact_scope.description: Who/what is affected (prose — not red-string eligible)

body_template: <!-- What the user/system observes. One paragraph. No interpretation. -->
<!-- Who is affected, how many, what can't they do. Quantify. -->
<!-- Minimal: smallest set of steps that triggers the issue -->
<!-- Complete: include all context someone needs to reproduce -->
<!-- Reproducible: verify these steps actually trigger the issue before submitting -->
<!-- If workaround_available: true — exact steps. If false: 'None known.' -->
<!-- If root_cause_known: true — explain. If false: 'Under investigation.' -->
